name: chart-bar-interactive
visual_summary: A bar chart with interactive elements, used for displaying categorical data with varying values, allowing users to hover over or click on individual bars for detailed information.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-bar-interactive
Description: A bar chart with interactive elements, used for displaying categorical data with varying values, allowing users to hover over or click on individual bars for detailed information.
Style: light, flat, web-design
Interactions: hover-effect, clickable-interaction
Tags: chart, bar, interactive, data-visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
